_comment: Stage 2 artifact for family-bootstrap. Capabilities lifted from site-build-procedure.md §6 (Phase 3 Design) plus the Awwwards-tier methodology research in docs/research/E2-agency-methodologies.md.

capabilities.name: mood-board
capabilities.description: Mood board + curated visual references with critique of why each works
capabilities.sop_cite: (implicit — not a named SOP deliverable; Awwwards-tier addition)

capabilities.name: art-direction
capabilities.description: Art Direction document — visual language, palette, typography, motion vocabulary
capabilities.sop_cite: (implicit — partially in §6.4 design system; Awwwards-tier elevates it to its own phase)

capabilities.name: concept
capabilities.description: Concept doc — creative direction, narrative, lore, defended creative territory
capabilities.sop_cite: (implicit — Awwwards-tier phase distinct from any SOP deliverable)

capabilities.name: motion-language
capabilities.description: Motion Language doc — timing, easing, choreography rules; motion tokens

capabilities.name: design-tokens
capabilities.description: DTCG JSON → Style Dictionary → CSS-vars + Tailwind v4 @theme + TypeScript types pipeline

capabilities.name: engineering-handoff-spec
capabilities.description: Engineering Handoff Spec — Design→Engineering contract at end of Phase 3

capabilities.name: concept-prototyping
capabilities.description: Concept prototype in 3D/runtime tools (Houdini, C4D, vvvv, WebGL) — distinct from clickable Figma proto

capabilities.name: wireframe-3-fidelity
capabilities.description: Wireframes across three fidelities (lo / mid / hi) — paper sketch → low-fi blocks → high-fi visual

capabilities.name: clickable-prototype
capabilities.description: Clickable prototype (Figma / Framer / coded) for usability testing top 3-5 user tasks

capabilities.name: usability-synthesis
capabilities.description: Synthesize usability test notes into severity-ranked issues with recommended fixes

capabilities.name: a11y-annotations
capabilities.description: Per-component accessibility annotations on hi-fi designs (semantic HTML, ARIA, keyboard, focus, contrast)

capabilities.name: design-system
capabilities.description: Full design-system documentation beyond tokens + states — Atomic Design hierarchy, content guidelines, maintenance discipline

capabilities.name: discovery-tick
capabilities.description: Phase 4 weekly continuous-discovery synthesis — interviews + analytics + experiments → next-week's hypotheses

capabilities.name: design-qa-checklist
capabilities.description: Design QA gate-relevant checklist — folds into a11y-annotations + component-states-matrix + the Stage 6 family audit

capabilities.name: design-handoff-walkthrough
capabilities.description: The hand-off walkthrough meeting itself — folds into engineering-handoff-spec's Capabilities Owned

capabilities.name: responsive-behavior-rules
capabilities.description: Per-component responsive behavior — folds into component-states-matrix + design-system
